attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT DISTINCT
ST.OBJECT_ID  as	OBJECT_ID  ,
SQ.DEAL_OBJECT_ID  as	DEAL_OBJECT_ID ,
ST.PARENT_ID 	as	QUOTE_OBJECT_ID     ,
APPROVAL_SCOPE	as	APPROVAL_SCOPE ,
PRECEDENCE	as	PRECEDENCE ,
APPR_QUEUE_SEQ	as	APPR_QUEUE_SEQ ,
APPR_CEC_ID	as	APPR_CEC_ID    ,
APPR_ROLE	as	APPR_ROLE  ,
APPR_TEAM_ID	as	APPR_TEAM_ID   ,
APPR_TEAM_NAME	as	APPR_TEAM_NAME ,
DEFAULT_TEAM_MEMBER	as	DEFAULT_TEAM_MEMBER ,
DECISION	as	DECISION   ,
BH_REWARD_CODE	as	BH_REWARD_CODE ,
CAN_MODIFY_DISCOUNT	as	CAN_MODIFY_DISCOUNT ,
IS_DYNAMICALLY_ADDED	as	IS_DYNAMICALLY_ADDED ,
CAN_ADD_APPROVER	as	CAN_ADD_APPROVER    ,
READ_ONLY_FLAG	as	READ_ONLY_FLAG ,
DECISION_SLA	as	DECISION_SLA   ,
REMINDER1_SLA	as	REMINDER1_SLA  ,
REMINDER2_SLA	as	REMINDER2_SLA  ,
ESC_SLA	as	ESC_SLA    ,
ESC_TYPE	as	ESC_TYPE   ,
ESC_ACTION_TYPE	as	ESC_ACTION_TYPE     ,
ESC_LEVEL	as	ESC_LEVEL  ,
ESC_APPR_1	as	ESC_APPR_1 ,
ESC_APPR_2	as	ESC_APPR_2 ,
ESC_APPR_3	as	ESC_APPR_3 ,
ESC_APPR_1_TEAM_NAME	as	ESC_APPR_1_TEAM_NAME ,
ESC_APPR_2_TEAM_NAME	as	ESC_APPR_2_TEAM_NAME ,
ESC_APPR_3_TEAM_NAME	as	ESC_APPR_3_TEAM_NAME ,
IS_CURRENT_APPROVER	as	IS_CURRENT_APPROVER ,
DECISION_SOURCE	as	DECISION_SOURCE     ,
CAST(LEFT(OREPLACE(DECISION_DATE,'T',' '), 19) as TIMESTAMP(0)) as	DECISION_DATE  ,
CAST(LEFT(OREPLACE(DECISION_PENDING_FROM_TS,'T',' '), 19) as TIMESTAMP(0)) as	DECISION_PENDING_FROM_TS      	,
COALESCE(CAST(LEFT(OREPLACE(ST.CREATED_ON,'T',' '), 19) as TIMESTAMP(0)),SQ.CREATED_ON) as	CREATED_ON ,
COALESCE(ST.CREATED_BY, SQ.CREATED_BY)	as	CREATED_BY ,
COALESCE(CAST(LEFT(OREPLACE(ST.UPDATED_ON,'T',' '), 19) as TIMESTAMP(0)),SQ.UPDATED_ON) as	UPDATED_ON ,
COALESCE(ST.UPDATED_BY,SQ.UPDATED_BY)	as	UPDATED_BY ,
NEXT_SLA_NOTIFN	as	NEXT_SLA_NOTIFN     ,
ESC_APPR_1_TEAM_MAILER_ALIAS	as	ESC_APPR_1_TEAM_MAILER_ALIAS  	,
ESC_APPR_2_TEAM_MAILER_ALIAS	as	ESC_APPR_2_TEAM_MAILER_ALIAS  	,
ESC_APPR_3_TEAM_MAILER_ALIAS	as	ESC_APPR_3_TEAM_MAILER_ALIAS  	,
IS_IMPLICIT_APPR	as	IS_IMPLICIT_APPR    ,
ST.UPDATED_BY_KAFKA	as	UPDATED_BY_KAFKA    ,
cast(left (ST.UPDATED_ON_KAFKA,19) as timestamp(0)) as UPDATED_ON_KAFKA,
ST.OFFSET_NUMBER as OFFSET_NUMBER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) as EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER as EDW_CREATE_USER,
ST.PARTITION_NUMBER as	PARTITION_NUMBER,
ST.MESSAGE_SEQUENCE_NUMBER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
DECISION_ID AS DECISION_ID,
PRECEDENCE_ID,
APPROVAL_SCOPE_ID
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CQ_APPROVAL_ROUTE_KAFKA_FF ST
 /*Replacing ST with EL Logic*/
INNER JOIN ( SELECT CAST(QUOTE_ID AS BIGINT) AS OBJECT_ID,DEAL_OBJECT_ID,
COALESCE(OREPLACE(OREPLACE(CREATED_BY,CHR(13),NULL),CHR(10),NULL) , UPDATED_BY,'UNKNOWN') as CREATED_BY,
COALESCE(EL.CREATED_ON, CURRENT_DATE) as CREATED_ON,
COALESCE(OREPLACE(OREPLACE(UPDATED_BY,CHR(13),NULL),CHR(10),NULL) , CREATED_BY,'UNKNOWN') AS UPDATED_BY,
COALESCE(EL.UPDATED_ON, CURRENT_DATE) as UPDATED_ON
 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_INT_CQ_SNGL_QUOTE_VW_KFKA EL 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY EL.DEAL_OBJECT_ID
ORDER BY EL.MESSAGE_SEQUENCE_NUMBER DESC)=1)  SQ ON ST.PARENT_ID = SQ.OBJECT_ID
Where NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM
$$ETLVWDB.EL_CQ_APPROVAL_ROUTE_KAFKA EL
WHERE ST.OBJECT_ID = EL.OBJECT_ID AND ST.MESSAGE_SEQUENCE_NUMBER = EL.MESSAGE_SEQUENCE_NUMBER
AND  ST.OFFSET_NUMBER = EL.OFFSET_NUMBER
)
